name: monitor-energia
description: Backend FastAPI + frontend Vite — um comando para subir tudo

scripts.rodar: npm run ports:free && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend:keepalive" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.rodar:plain: npm run ports:free && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cross-env USE_LOCAL_SQLITE=true python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080
